name: Kunjana Ghimire
profileSummary: Kunjana Ghimire, popularly known by her serial name Suntali, is a Nepalese philanthropist, comedian, actress and a social worker. She is one of the main characters of the Nepali TV series Meri Bassai. She is considered one of Nepal's most talented actresses because she had played various roles in her own sitcom Meri Bassai. She is highly devoted towards in social work in Nepal.
